query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.supplierName, s.status,
  s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.dataSource,
  s.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  s.serviceId, s.connectionId, s.locationAddress
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.serviceId IN ('BU278922','BU278923','BU290126','BU291154','BU301770','BU312372','BU123907155','BU123970473')
   OR s.connectionId IN ('BU278922','BU278923','BU290126','BU291154','BU301770','BU312372','BU123907155','BU123970473')
   OR s.planName IN ('BU278922','BU278923','BU290126','BU291154','BU301770','BU312372','BU123907155','BU123970473')
ORDER BY s.status;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.supplierName, s.status,
  s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.dataSource,
  s.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  s.serviceId, s.connectionId, s.locationAddress
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.serviceId IN ('BU278922','BU278923','BU290126','BU291154','BU301770','BU312372','BU123907155','BU123970473')
   OR s.connectionId IN ('BU278922','BU278923','BU290126','BU291154','BU301770','BU312372','BU123907155','BU123970473')
   OR s.planName IN ('BU278922','BU278923','BU290126','BU291154','BU301770','BU312372','BU123907155','BU123970473')
ORDER BY s.status;
